headline: The shutdown of Anthropic's Fable 5 by US government order anchored a week dominated by agent memory infrastructure and Model Context Protocol.
body: Multiple videos covered Fable 5 and Mythos 5 being pulled three days after public release by government order, framing it around frontier AI access, model restrictions, and a widening AI adoption gap. Model Context Protocol led the rotation and broke out, positioned as the connective layer between design systems and coding agents. Memory systems surged alongside new entrants RAG, knowledge graphs, and automated ingestion, driven by self-improving knowledge base workflows that ingest notes and email through cron jobs for persistent agent memory. On the inference side, Xiaomi's 1-trillion-parameter MiMo-V2.5-Pro hit over 1,000 tokens per second using speculative decoding and persistent GPU kernels, both fresh entrants.
